summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Event Services Discovery Platform MVP. All core functionality working correctly including authentication for 3 user roles, vendor CRUD operations, admin management, and discovery API integration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - FastAPI HTTPBearer returns 403 by design

minor_issues.issue: 404 errors for missing favicon/static resources in console
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact on user experience

passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with role selection cards
Planner authentication (signup and login) works perfectly
Vendor authentication (signup and login) works perfectly
Admin authentication (signup and login) works perfectly
Planner dashboard loads with map interface and proper placeholders
Vendor can create profile with all required fields
Vendor can view and update profile information
Admin can view all vendors with statistics
Discovery API returns active vendors correctly
Category filtering works in both backend and frontend
JWT token authentication works across all endpoints
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.backend: 87.5% (21/24 tests passed - 3 'failures' are actually correct 403 responses)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All authentication flows, CRUD operations, and UI interactions working)
